About Badya
Badya October is one of the artworks by Palm Hills Development that offers a new and unique concept of life. The luxurious gated community is expected to be a home for 153,000 residents.  



It is more than a green, sustainable residential compound in a central location. Rather, it is a whole new concept of life; it offers a unique living experience. Badya Palm Hills extends over a massive land area of 3000 acres situated in West Cairo. 



The project implements a philosophy of the 3 C’s: Conscious (Green City), Cognitive (Safe and Smart), and Connected (Convenient).



The conscious aspect focuses on reducing electrical utilization and water consumption, operational costs, waste production, and energy demand of buildings. It also works on producing 30% of its energy through renewable sources.



Regarding the cognitive aspect, Badya is a smart city that depends on and utilizes the latest technologies and artificial intelligence for the best residence experience.



Finally, being a connected, convenient compound, Badya Palm Hills is easily accessible from the outside and on the inside.

About Badya
Badya October is one of the artworks by Palm Hills Development that offers a new and unique concept of life. The luxurious gated community is expected to be a home for 153,000 residents.  



It is more than a green, sustainable residential compound in a central location. Rather, it is a whole new concept of life; it offers a unique living experience. Badya Palm Hills extends over a massive land area of 3000 acres situated in West Cairo. 



The project implements a philosophy of the 3 C’s: Conscious (Green City), Cognitive (Safe and Smart), and Connected (Convenient).



The conscious aspect focuses on reducing electrical utilization and water consumption, operational costs, waste production, and energy demand of buildings. It also works on producing 30% of its energy through renewable sources.



Regarding the cognitive aspect, Badya is a smart city that depends on and utilizes the latest technologies and artificial intelligence for the best residence experience.



Finally, being a connected, convenient compound, Badya Palm Hills is easily accessible from the outside and on the inside.

samples.title: 75 sqm with full services
samples.description:
Trevana is one of the most distinguished fully integrated residential projects in the prestigious Mubarak 6 area of Hurghada. The project combines contemporary living with wellness and luxury concepts, creating a balanced lifestyle experience.
Spanning an area of 10,200 m², Trevana dedicates 4,000 m² to carefully designed green landscapes, along with a 3,500 m² fully integrated medical center. The residential buildings occupy 3,000 m², featuring modern architectural designs that seamlessly blend elegance with functionality.
Location:
Trevana is located in one of the calmest and most well-organized areas of Hurghada, with close proximity to the city’s key attractions:
•	5 km (approximately 7 minutes) from Hurghada International Airport.
•	A short distance from Senzo Mall via the main highway, ensuring easy access to shopping and entertainment.
•	Surrounded by comprehensive services that make daily life more convenient and comfortable.
Trevana Project Features:

•	2 modern swimming pools offering refreshing vibes throughout the day.
•	A fully integrated wellness center including a fully equipped gym and a luxurious spa.
•	Two dedicated kids’ areas designed for fun and safety.
•	24/7 security system with advanced surveillance cameras.
•	Luxury lobby & pool bar adding a refined hotel-style touch.
•	4,000 m² of landscaped green areas providing a peaceful environment full of positive energy.
Surrounding Services
•	Close to Sheraton Street and Downtown Hurghada.
•	Daily shopping destinations: Senzo Mall – Carrefour – Best Way – Kheir Zaman.
•	Nearby hospitals: El Kawthar – Nile – El Hayah – El Masry Hospital.
•	Prestigious schools: St. Joseph – Hurghada International – German School.
•	Access to events and exhibitions held at the Touristic Marina.
•	Ideal areas for evening walks and cycling in a safe and pleasant environment.

samples.title: One Bedroom 125 SQM - Sea View - Private Beach
samples.description:
MAJRA 
Project Overview:
Majra… a new landmark of elegance in the heart of El Ahyaa
An integrated development that opens the doors to privacy and comfort with exceptional standards, creating an unprecedented lifestyle. What makes Magra truly unique is being the first project to introduce a dedicated tracking path.
Location:
Magra is located in the heart of El Ahyaa, right on the Tourist Promenade, next to Bellagio Hotel
Spaces:
.The project extends over a total area of 15,000 m², with only 40% built-up and 60% dedicated to greenery.
 .An internal landscape and green areas covering 8,400 m².
.The project includes only 220 residential units, ensuring the highest levels of privacy and comfort.
Project Facilities:
At Magra, every detail of luxury is designed for you and your family
3 swimming pools at different levels, suitable for all ages.
A private sandy beach offering moments of pure relaxation.
A natural lagoon with fun water games for children.
An elegant beachfront restaurant for a unique dining experience with sea views.
A private marina for seaside walks and leisure.
A safe kids’ area where children can play freely with peace of mind.
14 modern elevators serving all buildings, and 6 residential floors with contemporary designs that ensure maximum comfort.
90% of units enjoy breathtaking sea views, with some featuring private garden
Surrounding Services:
Daily shopping made easy with top nearby markets like Carrefour, Khair Zaman, and Best Way.

Comprehensive medical services with more than 11 private hospitals, in addition to Hurghada International Hospital.

High-quality education with prestigious schools such as Leaders, the French School, and the Japanese School.
Exceptional proximity to the new Red Sea University.
Unforgettable sea trips: enjoy diving, snorkeling, yacht rides, or full-day excursions to the enchanting island
Investment Opportunities:
The resort is managed by Prime Hotels Management, ensuring professional hospitality services.

samples.title: One Bedroom 73 SQM - Heart of Hurghada- Magawish
samples.description:
Clan Resort
The Clan project spans an area of 10,000 m² and is designed in a unique W-shaped architectural style, offering all units open and distinctive views. The project features an elegant single façade overlooking the sea, with 75% of the units enjoying a refined panoramic sea view.
Strategic Location
Clan is situated in a prime spot on Magawish Tourist Road, next to the New Eagles Hotel, giving owners the opportunity to access the hotel’s private beach. The project also enjoys proximity to key landmarks and services:
•	Five minutes from Hurghada International Airport
•	Next to the Pickalbatros Hotels Group
•	Steps away from the Magawish Tourist Promenade
•	Close to the Grand Aquarium and Fish Exhibition
•	Adjacent to Al Hayat Hospital for easy access to medical services
•	A short distance from City Center Mall

The development comprises 11 buildings, each with five floors, equipped with 11 elevators for smooth mobility. It includes a built-up area of 6,000 m² and 4,000 m² of internal landscaping, representing 15% of the total space, creating a balanced environment between the buildings and green areas.
Key Features & Services
4 diverse swimming pools
A shopping center with shops, restaurants, and cafés
2 jacuzzis for relaxation and luxury
Premium hotel management offering comprehensive services
W-shaped architectural design ensuring privacy and open views
75% of units with direct sea view
Investment Opportunities
Clan Resort combines a strategic location with comprehensive hotel services, making it an ideal choice for luxury living or high-return investment. It offers a modern lifestyle that blends comfort, entertainment, and exceptional sea views.

samples.title: Fancy 1 Bedroom apartment for sale in a resort!!
samples.description:
About the Project:
Hayat Resort in Al Ahyaa – Hurghada is a modern beachfront property in Hurghada designed for those seeking coastal living with exceptional facilities and open green spaces. With 80% of the masterplan dedicated to gardens, pools, and leisure areas, the resort offers a peaceful and elegant environment in one of the best residential areas in Hurghada. Positioned between Hurghada City and El Gouna, Hayat is a high-value destination for both residents and buyers looking to buy an apartment in Hurghada within a premium community.

Key Highlights:

Beachfront living with 7 pools across the resort
Sea view apartments in one of the top luxury compounds Hurghada
Only 5 minutes from El Gouna and 15 minutes from Hurghada Airport
High demand area with strong investment properties Egypt potential
80% landscaped design with walking paths, greenery, and outdoor leisure
Available Unit Types:
Chalet
1-Bedroom Apartment
2-Bedroom Apartment
About the Location:
5 minutes to El Gouna
15 minutes to Hurghada Airport
Access to private marina and waterfront activities
Close to schools, supermarkets, and services
High capital appreciation in a fast-growing zone
About the Facilities:
Private marina
7 swimming pools (including heated pools)
Aqua park
Restaurant & café
Gym & spa
Hotel apartments
Commercial area (2,000 m²)
Housekeeping & concierge services
Security & CCTV
Underground parking
Walking paths & landscaped gardens
Why Invest in Hayat Resort?
Hayat Resort delivers exceptional long-term value with its beachfront setting, modern architecture, and rare combination of private marina access, multiple pools, and extensive landscaped areas. Its location in a high-growth district between Hurghada and El Gouna positions it as one of the strongest opportunities in the Hurghada real estate market, making it ideal for lifestyle buyers and investors seeking capital growth and strong rental potential.

samples.title: One Bedroom 622 SQM - Street View - Private Beach
samples.description:
IBIZA BAY
At IBIZA BAY, tranquility meets luxury in a resort designed to offer you a fully integrated seaside lifestyle.

Location:
El Ahyaa District, Hurghada
IBIZA BAY enjoys a strategic location in El Ahyaa with excellent transportation links:
• 20 minutes (24 km) from Hurghada International Airport
• 5 minutes from El Gouna
• 10 minutes from Downtown Hurghada
The resort stretches along an 11 km beachfront, offering both serenity and convenient access to main services, educational institutions, and entertainment hubs.

Project Details:
• Total Land Area: 3,000 sqm
• 60% elegant and modern buildings
• 40% landscaped areas with fountains and waterfalls creating a natural, relaxing atmosphere

Facilities and Amenities:
• Private beach with full privacy
• 3 swimming pools for all ages
• Main café and restaurant with pool views
• Luxurious rooftop with spa, restaurant, and café overlooking the sea
• Fountains and waterfalls adding elegance and calm across the resort

Nearby Landmarks:
Shopping: Best Way, Carrefour, Gomla Market, Spinneys, Tayba Farm, and Kheir Zaman Market, plus daily convenience stores.
Banks: Egyptian International Bank, Banque Misr, and the Housing & Development Bank.
Tourist Promenade: An 11 km coastal walkway along the Red Sea with restaurants, bazaars, and leisure cafés.
Entertainment & Attractions: Hurghada Grand Aquarium, Hurghada International Club, and Red Sea Water Sports Academy.
Healthcare: Hurghada International Hospital and more than 11 nearby private hospitals and clinics.
Education: Close to El Gouna International School, Nile Riad International School, Al-Hekma Private School, and South Valley University (Hurghada branch).
Transportation & Beaches: Easy access to public transport, the private beach, and the Red Sea promenade.

At IBIZA BAY, you’ll experience comfort, privacy, and a smart investment opportunity in the prime Al ahyaa area — a unique lifestyle directly on the Red Sea.

samples.title: Hayat Beach Resort – Live, Invest, Belong!
samples.description:
On the shores of the Red Sea, between Hurghada and El Gouna, the Hayat Beach Resort offers a unique opportunity for those seeking investment returns or their dream home.  Completion: June 2028

 Why is Hayat Resort a great choice?

Strategic location: Only 5 minutes from El Gouna and 15 minutes from the airport.

High value growth: Property prices in Al Ahyaa are continuously rising thanks to infrastructure development.

Modern design: Inspired by the waves of the sea, combining natural stone and glass surfaces.

Luxury services: 7 swimming pools, aquapark, restaurant, spa, gym, private beach, and marina.

Sustainable lifestyle: 80% green areas, peace, and security.

Offer – Studio apartment with sea view

37 m²

Total price: 2,775,000 EGP (≈49,278 EUR)

Cash price with 20% discount: 2,220,000 EGP (≈39,431 EUR)

Payment plan: 15% down payment, then 39,313 EGP (≈698 EUR) monthly for 60 months

The Hayat Beach Resort is not just a property, but a lifestyle: seaside tranquility, modern comfort, and a secure investment all in one.

samples.title: Modern Living in the Heart of Magawish CLAN Resort
samples.description:
Experience contemporary living at CLAN, a well-planned residential community spread over 10,000 m² in Magawish, directly in front of Eagle's Hotel. CLAN is designed for comfort, convenience, and modern elegance—all in one prime location.

Why You’ll Love It
Live in a vibrant community surrounded by essential services, leisure spaces, and a welcoming atmosphere. CLAN blends modern residential space with an active lifestyle setting.

Exclusive Features
• Four swimming pools (including two heated pools)
• Two Jacuzzis and an outdoor pool bar
• Café, coffee shop, and casual dining venues
• Kids' play zone and fully equipped gyms
• Retail shops, supermarket, and pharmacy inside the community
• Six gated entrances with full 24/7 security
• Underground parking for added convenience

Choose from a variety of thoughtfully designed units:
• Studios
• 1-bedroom apartments
• 2-bedroom apartments
• 3-bedroom apartments

Each layout focuses on comfort, function, and style for both living and investment.
Discover a 58 m² studio on the first floor offering stunning pool views—the perfect blend of modern design, cozy comfort, and resort-style living.

Flexible Payment Plans
• 20% cash discount for upfront buyers
• 20% down payment with installments up to 60 months
• 15% down payment with installments up to 48 months
Maintenance: 10% once only
Delivery: December 2027

Homes Bay – Your Real Estate Partner
Homes Bay assists you from the first inquiry to the final contract with full transparency and guidance in any language you prefer. We also secure special offers and the best investment opportunities tailored specifically to your needs.
samples.areaName: Red Sea, Hurghada, Hurghada Resorts

samples.title: One Bedroom 73 SQM - Heart of Hurghada- Magawish
samples.description:
Clan Resort
The Clan project spans an area of 10,000 m² and is designed in a unique W-shaped architectural style, offering all units open and distinctive views. The project features an elegant single façade overlooking the sea, with 75% of the units enjoying a refined panoramic sea view.
Strategic Location
Clan is situated in a prime spot on Magawish Tourist Road, next to the New Eagles Hotel, giving owners the opportunity to access the hotel’s private beach. The project also enjoys proximity to key landmarks and services:
•	Five minutes from Hurghada International Airport
•	Next to the Pickalbatros Hotels Group
•	Steps away from the Magawish Tourist Promenade
•	Close to the Grand Aquarium and Fish Exhibition
•	Adjacent to Al Hayat Hospital for easy access to medical services
•	A short distance from City Center Mall

The development comprises 11 buildings, each with five floors, equipped with 11 elevators for smooth mobility. It includes a built-up area of 6,000 m² and 4,000 m² of internal landscaping, representing 15% of the total space, creating a balanced environment between the buildings and green areas.
Key Features & Services
4 diverse swimming pools
A shopping center with shops, restaurants, and cafés
2 jacuzzis for relaxation and luxury
Premium hotel management offering comprehensive services
W-shaped architectural design ensuring privacy and open views
75% of units with direct sea view
Investment Opportunities
Clan Resort combines a strategic location with comprehensive hotel services, making it an ideal choice for luxury living or high-return investment. It offers a modern lifestyle that blends comfort, entertainment, and exceptional sea views.

samples.title: Two Bedrooms 86 SQM - Largest Swimming pool 25 M2
samples.description:
Holidays Park

An integrated residential and investment experience in the heart of Hurghada
Location:

On the Tourist Villages Road in the Magawish area, opposite Al Yasmin Village and next to the Titanic Royal Hotel. The resort boasts a prime location that puts you close to Hurghada's most important landmarks:

• Just 10 minutes from Hurghada International Airport
• 10 minutes from Sahl Hasheesh
• 5 minutes from Senzo Club and Senzo Mall
• 15 minutes from Al Kawthar area
• 20 minutes from Hurghada Marina

Project Details:

The resort spans a total area of 45,000 square meters, featuring a smart layout that prioritizes nature and visual comfort. Landscaping comprises over 80% of the area, encompassing approximately 36,000 square meters of green spaces, gardens, and water features, with an additional 20,000 square meters dedicated to outdoor landscaping.

Buildings occupy only 20% of the total area, ensuring privacy and tranquility within the resort.


Landscaping and Outdoor Amenities:

Holidays Park offers a comprehensive recreational environment that provides residents and visitors with a world-class resort experience, including:

• A massive main swimming pool measuring 250m x 35m.
• A natural lagoon with a 120m beachfront.
• Nine strategically located swimming pools serving all areas.
• Three dedicated children's areas (Kids Areas) designed with the highest safety standards.
• The largest water park in the region, featuring 11 water rides suitable for all ages.
• Two restaurants and two cafes with direct views of the swimming pools.

The Clubhouse:

The Clubhouse spans 9,000 square meters and features:
• Two shopping malls with tourist bazaars, shops, restaurants, and cafes.
• A fully equipped gym with state-of-the-art training equipment.
• A luxurious spa offering relaxation and pampering experiences.
• An outdoor plaza adorned with green spaces, elegant seating areas, and stunning water features.

Additional Services:

• A fully equipped medical center with a

samples.title: Three Bedrooms 148SQM- 18 Swimming Pools
samples.description:
ONE7
ONE7 is a prestigious new development by Kronberg, setting a new standard for luxury, privacy, and modern living. Located in the prime Magawish area, it offers an exclusive living experience in a sought-after location just minutes from Hurghada's best amenities.
Project overview
•	Location: 10 minutes from Sahl Hasheesh, 5 minutes from Senzo Mall, 15 minutes from El Kawther, 20 minutes from Hurghada Marina, and 10 minutes from Hurghada Airport
•	Total Area: 65,000 m², including 25,000 m² commercial space and 52,000 m² residential and landscape area
•	Residential Units: Only 200 exclusive units, ensuring privacy and exclusivity.
•	Completely project: delivery date 2 years
Luxury living
•	Exclusive Villas: 12 spacious villas with private gardens and pools and 12 elevators 
•	Step-back Design: Balconies designed to ensure privacy, with sections stepping back or extending at different levels
•	Balconies: Double-glazed glass for enhanced privacy
•	Private Gardens: Each unit features private terraces and gardens with 3-meter-high tree walls between units
•	Secure Access: 3 main gates and no cars allowed inside the residential area or on the walking track for safety
•	Parking: 800 car spaces available outside the compound
Exquisite Amenities
•	Water Features: 10000 m² of water features, including a Lazy River, Sandy Lagoon, and a stunning waterfall
•	Pools: 11 pools, including 7 main pools, 10 smaller pools, and a designated children’s pool. Two heated pools, Infinity Pool with fountain 
•	Wellness and Leisure: 
o	Clubhouse with gym, wellness facilities, café, and social spaces
o	Yoga Area: Outdoor yoga space for relaxation and wellbeing
o	Recreational Courts: Padel, tennis, and basketball courts, Football Club
•	Green Spaces: 80% of the development dedicated to landscaping, with a 230 x 300 m² walking track for outdoor activities 700 M2 tall
•	Boutique Hotel: A 52-suite hotel with pools, ideal for guests (Apartments Brands)
•	Mini-Market and Restaurants: On-site dini
samples.areaName: Red Sea, Hurghada, Hurghada Resorts

samples.title: 75 sqm with full services
samples.description:
Trevana is one of the most distinguished fully integrated residential projects in the prestigious Mubarak 6 area of Hurghada. The project combines contemporary living with wellness and luxury concepts, creating a balanced lifestyle experience.
Spanning an area of 10,200 m², Trevana dedicates 4,000 m² to carefully designed green landscapes, along with a 3,500 m² fully integrated medical center. The residential buildings occupy 3,000 m², featuring modern architectural designs that seamlessly blend elegance with functionality.
Location:
Trevana is located in one of the calmest and most well-organized areas of Hurghada, with close proximity to the city’s key attractions:
•	5 km (approximately 7 minutes) from Hurghada International Airport.
•	A short distance from Senzo Mall via the main highway, ensuring easy access to shopping and entertainment.
•	Surrounded by comprehensive services that make daily life more convenient and comfortable.
Trevana Project Features:

•	2 modern swimming pools offering refreshing vibes throughout the day.
•	A fully integrated wellness center including a fully equipped gym and a luxurious spa.
•	Two dedicated kids’ areas designed for fun and safety.
•	24/7 security system with advanced surveillance cameras.
•	Luxury lobby & pool bar adding a refined hotel-style touch.
•	4,000 m² of landscaped green areas providing a peaceful environment full of positive energy.
Surrounding Services
•	Close to Sheraton Street and Downtown Hurghada.
•	Daily shopping destinations: Senzo Mall – Carrefour – Best Way – Kheir Zaman.
•	Nearby hospitals: El Kawthar – Nile – El Hayah – El Masry Hospital.
•	Prestigious schools: St. Joseph – Hurghada International – German School.
•	Access to events and exhibitions held at the Touristic Marina.
•	Ideal areas for evening walks and cycling in a safe and pleasant environment.

samples.title: Two Bedrooms 82SQM- Privacy Place at Hurghada
samples.description:
At Trevana… every day begins with comfort and ends with pure luxury.
Location
Perfectly set on El Inter Road in the heart of Mubarak 6 villas, near Sameh Howeidak Square. A prime address combining peace of mind with high demand for living and investment.
About the Project
Trevana spans 9,300 sqm, with 3,600 sqm dedicated to residences, a private hospital of 3,000 sqm, and 4,000 sqm of lush landscaped gardens. A community where modern living meets wellness and green spaces.
Facilities
•	Two swimming pools for adults and children.
•	Expansive green areas creating a healthy and tranquil atmosphere.
•	Restaurant & café with indoor and outdoor seating.
•	Safe and fun kids’ play area.
•	Fully equipped gym.
Key Features
•	The first resort in the area with its own private hospital, offering a unique medical tourism advantage.
•	A lifestyle that balances privacy, comfort, healthcare, and leisure.
•	Smart design that blends residential living with essential services.
Nearby Landmarks
•	Schools: German International School – St. Joseph School – located in El Kawthar near the bowling center.
•	Hospitals: Al Hayah Hospital, Al Yasmine Hospital.
•	Shopping: Carrefour, Gomla Market.
•	Attractions: Hurghada Museum, Red Sea Fish Exhibition, New Eagles Hotel, Grand Aquarium.
•	Minutes away from the new Magawish Promenade.
Investment in Trevana
•	Prime location in Mubarak 6, just minutes from Magawish Promenade.
•	Close to the airport, international schools, and hospitals – ensuring strong rental demand.
•	A private hospital within the resort adds unmatched value and appeal.
•	Fully serviced community ideal for both permanent living and holiday rentals.
•	Promising rental returns all year round thanks to its location and facilities.
Trevana… where comfort begins, luxury continues, and smart investment never ends.

Taj City Project
900 acres on the Suez Road, opposite Cairo Airport, with a frontage on the Ring Road, JW Marriott, and Shinsoo Ape Axis
Taj City Compound Overview

Taj City is a distinguished residential project located in New Cairo, Egypt. The compound offers many features that make it a preferred destination for many residents. Here is a brief overview of Taj City Compound:



Location

Taj City Compound is strategically located on the Suez Road, near Cairo International Airport. It is easily accessible from many vital areas in New Cairo and downtown Cairo.



Design and Facilities

Taj City Compound is designed to be an integrated residential city providing all the daily needs of its residents. The compound features a modern design and various facilities, including:



Extensive Green Spaces: The compound includes numerous gardens and green areas, providing a serene and beautiful environment for residents.

Sports Club: The compound has a sports club equipped with the latest equipment and offers a variety of sports activities.

Swimming Pools: There are several swimming pools suitable for both adults and children.

Commercial Areas: The compound includes commercial areas with shops, restaurants, and cafes to meet the needs of the residents.

International Schools: The compound offers international schools to ensure quality education for children.

Medical Centers: The area contains comprehensive medical centers to provide healthcare services to the residents.

Security and Guarding: The compound offers round-the-clock security and guarding services to ensure the safety of the residents.

Types of Housing

Taj

The towers are also close to the famous Alamein Lake, which is dedicated to cruises, yachts, and boats.

samples.title: 75 sqm with full services
samples.description:
Trevana is one of the most distinguished fully integrated residential projects in the prestigious Mubarak 6 area of Hurghada. The project combines contemporary living with wellness and luxury concepts, creating a balanced lifestyle experience.
Spanning an area of 10,200 m², Trevana dedicates 4,000 m² to carefully designed green landscapes, along with a 3,500 m² fully integrated medical center. The residential buildings occupy 3,000 m², featuring modern architectural designs that seamlessly blend elegance with functionality.
Location:
Trevana is located in one of the calmest and most well-organized areas of Hurghada, with close proximity to the city’s key attractions:
•	5 km (approximately 7 minutes) from Hurghada International Airport.
•	A short distance from Senzo Mall via the main highway, ensuring easy access to shopping and entertainment.
•	Surrounded by comprehensive services that make daily life more convenient and comfortable.
Trevana Project Features:

•	2 modern swimming pools offering refreshing vibes throughout the day.
•	A fully integrated wellness center including a fully equipped gym and a luxurious spa.
•	Two dedicated kids’ areas designed for fun and safety.
•	24/7 security system with advanced surveillance cameras.
•	Luxury lobby & pool bar adding a refined hotel-style touch.
•	4,000 m² of landscaped green areas providing a peaceful environment full of positive energy.
Surrounding Services
•	Close to Sheraton Street and Downtown Hurghada.
•	Daily shopping destinations: Senzo Mall – Carrefour – Best Way – Kheir Zaman.
•	Nearby hospitals: El Kawthar – Nile – El Hayah – El Masry Hospital.
•	Prestigious schools: St. Joseph – Hurghada International – German School.

Location:
Trevana is located in one of the calmest and most well-organized areas of Hurghada, with close proximity to the city’s key attractions:
•	5 km (approximately 7 minutes) from Hurghada International Airport.
•	A short distance from Senzo Mall via the main highway, ensuring easy access to shopping and entertainment.
•	Surrounded by comprehensive services that make daily life more convenient and comfortable.
Trevana Project Features:

•	2 modern swimming pools offering refreshing vibes throughout the day.
•	A fully integrated wellness center including a fully equipped gym and a luxurious spa.
•	Two dedicated kids’ areas designed for fun and safety.
•	24/7 security system with advanced surveillance cameras.
•	Luxury lobby & pool bar adding a refined hotel-style touch.
•	4,000 m² of landscaped green areas providing a peaceful environment full of positive energy.
Surrounding Services
•	Close to Sheraton Street and Downtown Hurghada.

samples.title: One Bedroom 73 SQM - Heart of Hurghada- Magawish
samples.description:
Clan Resort
The Clan project spans an area of 10,000 m² and is designed in a unique W-shaped architectural style, offering all units open and distinctive views. The project features an elegant single façade overlooking the sea, with 75% of the units enjoying a refined panoramic sea view.
Strategic Location
Clan is situated in a prime spot on Magawish Tourist Road, next to the New Eagles Hotel, giving owners the opportunity to access the hotel’s private beach. The project also enjoys proximity to key landmarks and services:
•	Five minutes from Hurghada International Airport
•	Next to the Pickalbatros Hotels Group
•	Steps away from the Magawish Tourist Promenade
•	Close to the Grand Aquarium and Fish Exhibition
•	Adjacent to Al Hayat Hospital for easy access to medical services
•	A short distance from City Center Mall

The development comprises 11 buildings, each with five floors, equipped with 11 elevators for smooth mobility. It includes a built-up area of 6,000 m² and 4,000 m² of internal landscaping, representing 15% of the total space, creating a balanced environment between the buildings and green areas.
Key Features & Services
4 diverse swimming pools
A shopping center with shops, restaurants, and cafés
2 jacuzzis for relaxation and luxury
Premium hotel management offering comprehensive services
W-shaped architectural design ensuring privacy and open views
75% of units with direct sea view
Investment Opportunities
Clan Resort combines a strategic location with comprehensive hotel services, making it an ideal choice for luxury living or high-return investment. It offers a modern lifestyle that blends comfort, entertainment, and exceptional sea views.

North Bay

North Bay is not just a place to live; it’s a serene oasis where life is a timeless flow of engaging experiences. The prime location immerses every resident in precious moments, and idyllic lifestyles are lived.

North Bay’s luxurious open lagoon living concept is what makes this new
neighborhood so desirable. Residences overlook an expansive lagoon that
connects to the sea. 

Legorreta is an internationally renowned architectural firm that was carefully chosen to turn North Bay’s vision into a breathtaking reality. Based in Mexico City and founded in 1965, Legorreta’s projects have won
several globally acclaimed awards. 

A public pavilion is the central hub where the discerning community can share experiences that enrich the quality of their lives. Here, events and gatherings become cherished moments to connect, socialize and celebrate together. The building will be the north’s most iconic landmark, that
captures the essence of North Bay itself.
A clubhouse that houses a gym, soothing spa and recreational activities will ensure residents always maintain a connection to their inner and outer wellness.

North Bay

North Bay is not just a place to live; it’s a serene oasis where life is a timeless flow of engaging experiences. The prime location immerses every resident in precious moments, and idyllic lifestyles are lived.

North Bay’s luxurious open lagoon living concept is what makes this new
neighborhood so desirable. Residences overlook an expansive lagoon that
connects to the sea. 

Legorreta is an internationally renowned architectural firm that was carefully chosen to turn North Bay’s vision into a breathtaking reality. Based in Mexico City and founded in 1965, Legorreta’s projects have won
several globally acclaimed awards. 

A public pavilion is the central hub where the discerning community can share experiences that enrich the quality of their lives. Here, events and gatherings become cherished moments to connect, socialize and celebrate together. The building will be the north’s most iconic landmark, that

samples.title: Luxury Furnished Lagoon-View Villa in Cyan  Gouna
samples.description:
Experience true waterfront luxury in this stunning fully furnished villa overlooking the lagoon in Cyan El Gouna — one of the most prestigious residential communities in El Gouna. The villa enjoys breathtaking open water views, offering privacy, tranquility, and an exceptional lifestyle.

Set on a 399 sqm plot with a built-up area of 155 sqm, the villa is thoughtfully designed to combine modern elegance with functional comfort. It features 4 spacious bedrooms, ideal for family living and hosting guests, along with 3 contemporary bathrooms finished to a high standard. The property also includes a separate nanny’s room, providing added convenience and privacy.

A standout feature of this villa is the private sauna room, allowing you to enjoy a spa-like relaxation experience in the comfort of your own home. The villa is sold fully furnished with stylish, high-quality furniture, making it move-in ready.

The generous outdoor space includes a private garden directly overlooking the lagoon, perfect for outdoor gatherings, relaxing evenings, or even adding a private swimming pool in the future. The seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living creates a unique waterfront experience.

Cyan El Gouna offers a secure and upscale community environment with close proximity to the marina, fine dining restaurants, golf courses, and private beaches — making this villa ideal as a permanent residence, luxury holiday home, or a high-value investment in one of Egypt’s most exclusive coastal destinations.

 Price: 1,350,000 USD

Own your lagoon-front dream villa and enjoy an elevated lifestyle of elegance, privacy, and Red Sea beauty.

Villa for Sale in Madinaty – New Cairo
By TMG - Ready to Move

Premium villa with practical layout in the heart of Madinaty, one of New Cairo’s top communities.

Unit Details:
	•	Developer: TMG
	•	Project: Madinaty – New Cairo
	•	Unit Type: Villa
	•	BUA: 222 sqm
	•	Land/Garden: 240 sqm
	•	Bedrooms: 3 + 1 Master Bedroom
	•	Bathrooms: 4
	•	Delivery: Ready to Move

	•	Total Price: EGP 19,500,000


 Contact us now for more info or to schedule a viewing.


About Madinaty
Madinaty is a fully integrated large city created to be your forever all-inclusive home. Madinaty was developed and brought to the real estate scene by the well-known developer Talaat Mustafa Group(TMG). 




Master Plan & Major Facilities of Madinaty
Three leading U.S. design firms—HHCP, SWA, and SASKI—worked together to create Madinaty's well-thought-out and comprehensive master plan. The result is a new city of international standards covering 8000 acres and offering a modern lifestyle. It stands out as the icon of modern cities, represented by our magnificently imposing main gate, which transforms Madinaty into a work of art.


Location of Madinaty
Madinaty compound enjoys a strategic location in New Cairo on the Cairo - Suez Road. thanks to this location, the compound is:



2 km from Al Shorouk City’s entrance
 A 10-minute drive from Heliopolis
 20 minutes far from downtown Cairo 
easily accessible through the Ring road

أسلوب حياة متكامل على ساحل البحر المتوسط مباشرة

عن منطقة Quayside – جيفيرا:
تُعد Quayside من أبرز المناطق السكنية داخل جيفيرا، وتقع بالقرب من البحر.
تتميز بتصميمات عملية وإطلالات هادئة ومستوى عالٍ من الخصوصية، مما يجعلها مثالية للعائلات والمعيشة الصيفية.

هذه الوحدة فرصة مثالية سواء كنت تبحث عن منزل صيفي للعائلة أو استثمار طويل الأجل ذكي في واحدة من أسرع الوجهات نموًا في الساحل الشمالي.

North Bay

North Bay is not just a place to live; it’s a serene oasis where life is a timeless flow of engaging experiences. The prime location immerses every resident in precious moments, and idyllic lifestyles are lived.

North Bay’s luxurious open lagoon living concept is what makes this new
neighborhood so desirable. Residences overlook an expansive lagoon that
connects to the sea. 

Legorreta is an internationally renowned architectural firm that was carefully chosen to turn North Bay’s vision into a breathtaking reality. Based in Mexico City and founded in 1965, Legorreta’s projects have won
several globally acclaimed awards. 

A public pavilion is the central hub where the discerning community can share experiences that enrich the quality of their lives. Here, events and gatherings become cherished moments to connect, socialize and celebrate together. The building will be the north’s most iconic landmark, that

samples.title: Prime Finished Apartment with Side Terrace View
samples.description:
Property Description:

Project Name: Icity October
Developer: Mountain View
Location: 6 October
Property Type: Apartment
Floor No: 2nd
Finishing: Fully Finished
Number of Bedrooms: 2
Number of Bathrooms: 2
BUA: 150m
Delivery Date: Ready To Move

This 150 sqm apartment is located on the 2nd floor with elevator access, offering a practical and welcoming layout. It includes two bedrooms, one of which is a master, along with two bathrooms. The home comes fully finished and equipped with kitchen cabinets, air conditioners, and water heaters. The terrace overlooks the club from the side, adding a pleasant outdoor space. A private parking slot is also included. The unit is rented without furniture, ideal for residents who want to furnish to their taste.

Key Features:

Fully finished unit with ACs, kitchen cabinets, and water heater

Terrace with partial club view

Master bedroom and practical layout

Private parking slot

About Icity October by Mountain View:

iCity October is one of Mountain View’s landmark developments, offering a modern lifestyle centered around walkability, greenery, and community living. The compound features vast parks, clubhouses, lakes, sports courts, promenades, cycling tracks, and a wide range of amenities designed for all age groups. With its American-style urban planning, security systems, cleanliness, and vibrant social atmosphere, iCity provides a balanced lifestyle combining comfort, entertainment, and convenience.

Financial Details:

Payment Method: Rent // Per Month
Total Inclusive: 30,000 EGP

Location of Fifth Square Compound in the Fifth Settlement

The location of Al Marasem Fifth Square New Cairo was chosen with great care, as it is located in the Golden Square area in the Fifth Settlement. This location is considered one of the best locations in New Cairo, as it combines several features that make it a distinctive choice for living and investment.
The Golden Square area is famous for providing the best services and facilities. The area includes many prestigious universities such as Future University and American University, making it suitable for students and parents. In addition, there are modern hospitals and high-quality schools in the area, providing an integrated living environment.
What increases the value of the site is its proximity to Cairo International Airport, which facilitates transportation and travel. In addition, there are many commercial malls, entertainment centers, restaurants and cafes in the area, providing residents with many options to spend their time happily.

*About Us*
Your Trusted Real Estate Partner in Maadi
At the heart of Maadi’s vibrant and green community, our real estate company is your go-to partner for tailored, end-to-end property solutions. We specialize in residential rentals, property resale, and comprehensive after-sales services — offering a seamless experience whether you’re relocating, investing, or searching for your perfect home.
What sets us apart is our deep understanding of Maadi’s unique blend of lush surroundings, elegant architecture, and modern infrastructure. From stylish, fully furnished apartments to spacious family villas, our curated property portfolio is designed to meet a wide range of lifestyles and budgets.
But we don’t stop at the transaction. Our dedicated after-sales support includes:
Maintenance coordination
Tenant management
Local market advice
Property supervision for owners abroad
Including full oversight, regular reporting, and assistance with utilities, upkeep, and tenant communication.
We also offer mobility-conscious property solutions, ensuring accessibility for individuals with disabilities or those using wheelchairs.
Full property maintenance — covering electrical work, plumbing, AC servicing, and more through trusted local technicians.
Relocation assistance — helping clients transition smoothly from one property to another, including packing, moving coordination, and settling in.
Whether you’re new to Maadi or a long-time resident looking for a change, we are committed to providing transparent, high-quality service rooted in local expertise and long-term relationships.
Let us help you turn your next move into a rewarding experience

About Madinaty:-
Madinaty is one of the most well-planned residential cities in East Cairo. It features a unique combination of green landscapes, modern residential buildings, and well-organized infrastructure including electricity, water, gas, and sewage networks. The city provides a comfortable and healthy environment with clean air, wide streets, and distance from heavy city congestion. It offers different types of residential units for various budgets, from apartments to luxury villas, making it a fully integrated private city developed by Talaat Moustafa Group.

Location:-
Madinaty is located in East Cairo on Suez Road, close to Heliopolis and Nasr City, and developed by Talaat Moustafa Group, the developer of several successful residential projects such as Al Rehab.

samples.title: شقة فندقية للايجار المفروش 4 غرف _ المهندسين
samples.description:
عنوان الشقة: المهندسين – شارع شهاب الرئيسي

عنوان الشقة: المهندسين – تفرع شارع شهاب 

مواصفات الشقة:
• المساحة 250 متر 
• ريسيبشن 
• 4 غرف منهم غرفة ماستر
• 3 حمام
 • ليفينج روم
•مطبخ مجهز بالكامل 
•اسنسير	2
• تشطيب الترا سوبر لوكس
• مفروشة مودرن بالكامل
• ارضيات رخام 
 أمن ٢٤ ساعة
• اسقف جيبسم بورد
• انترنت
----------
ليه تسكن في المهندسين؟
يقع حي المهندسين في وسط محافظة الجيزة بالقرب من حي الزمالك والدقى والعجوزة، ويرتبط بغرب القاهرة (مدينة 6 اكتوبر والشيخ زايد) وشرقها (القاهرة الجديدة) عن طريق كوبري 6 أكتوبر (من شارع أحمد عرابي)، والدائري و المحور (من ميدان لبنان)، وكوبري 15 مايو (من شارع جامعة الدول العربية)، وقد ارتبط اسم المهندسين باسم منطقة التجارة في جميع المجالات حيث تضم أكثر من 200 متجر يعمل يوميًا حوالي 18 ساعة يوميًا، حيث يوجد الكثير من ماركات الملابس العالمية مثل (Pull and Bear - Massimo Dutti - Tommy Hilfiger – Bershka – Timberland – Adidas - Nike)، والمطاعم مثل (Primo’s - Porta D’oro – Spago - Mr. Koko - Red Elephant)، والمقاهى مثل (Cilantro – Costa - Beanos – cinnabon – Fratelli - Cloud 9)، وتعتبر اهم الشوارع في المهندسين هي (شارع جامعة الدول العربية - شارع البطل أحمد عبدالعزيز - شارع محي الدين أبو العز - شارع شهاب - شارع جزيرة العرب)، وأهم الميادين (ميدان لبنان - ميدان سفنكس)، واهم النوادي الرياضية في المهندسين هي (نادي الزمالك - نادي الصيد - نادي التوفيقية).

Residents will benefit from 24/7 doormen service and the convenience of being located on White Nile Street, close to all local amenities. The apartment is available for long term lease at 40,000 EGP per month, with price flexibility for serious annual contracts.

يقع حي المهندسين في وسط محافظة الجيزة بالقرب من حي الزمالك والدقى والعجوزة، ويرتبط بغرب القاهرة (مدينة 6 اكتوبر والشيخ زايد) وشرقها (القاهرة الجديدة) عن طريق كوبري 6 أكتوبر (من شارع أحمد عرابي)، والدائري و المحور (من ميدان لبنان)، وكوبري 15 مايو (من شارع جامعة الدول العربية)، وقد ارتبط اسم المهندسين باسم منطقة التجارة في جميع المجالات حيث تضم أكثر من 200 متجر يعمل يوميًا حوالي 18 ساعة يوميًا، حيث يوجد الكثير من ماركات الملابس العالمية مثل (Pull and Bear - Massimo Dutti - Tommy Hilfiger – Bershka – Timberland – Adidas - Nike)، والمطاعم مثل (Primo’s - Porta D’oro – Spago - Mr. Koko - Red Elephant)، والمقاهى مثل (Cilantro – Costa - Beanos – cinnabon – Fratelli - Cloud 9)، وتعتبر اهم الشوارع في المهندسين هي (شارع جامعة الدول العربية - شارع البطل أحمد عبدالعزيز - شارع محي الدين أبو العز - شارع شهاب - شارع جزيرة العرب)، وأهم الميادين (ميدان لبنان - ميدان سفنكس)، واهم النوادي الرياضية في المهندسين هي (نادي الزمالك - نادي الصيد - نادي التوفيقية).

ABOUT THE COMMUNITY/PROJECT

Emaar Misr is a sophisticated residential complex located on the highest plateau of Egypt & at the heart of Cairo

It is one of the projects of Emaar Misr; the area of the project was built at an altitude of 200 meters above sea level, and it extends on 4,000,000 km, 1200 acres.

Only 20% of the total space of the compound has been utilized for the construction of residential units, while the remaining space is for the green spaces, facilities, and services.

The project is only:
10 min away from Maadi.
23 min to Nasr City and Heliopolis.

Al narges neighborhood is an area characterized by rapid urban development and advanced planning. The neighborhood of new Narges is characterized by its proximity to many vital areas and necessary facilities such as international schools, commercial malls, and hospitals, making it an ideal destination to live and settle. The neighborhood also provides easy access to the main roads, making it easier to move in and out of Cairo.

Thanks to its privileged location and modern design, the new Narges neighborhood is a favorite destination for many individuals and families wishing to live in a quiet and luxurious environment.

The new Narges neighborhood is located in the heart of the Fifth Settlement. 
To the north of the Nargis neighborhood are the southern and Northern nineties streets and the Gamal Abdel Nasser axis. 
From the south direction there is Ain Sokhna road and Ring Road.
It is located east of the new Nargis neighborhood, rehab city, and the Mohammed Najib axis.
On the west side there is the Fatima Al-Sharbatly mosque, the diplomatic compound and the German university.

The location of Al narges neighborhood is characterized by being vital and close to all the basic and necessary facilities and services that residents need, and also close to the main roads and axes,

The apartment is available for long-term rent at 60,000 EGP per month, presenting excellent value in a prime New Cairo location.

The Village Compound in the Fifth Settlement, one of Palm Hills Developments' projects, is considered one of the most prominent upscale residential communities in the heart of New Cairo. The project combines technological innovation with the latest technologies, offering a range of modern amenities within its diverse residential units.



In addition, The Village Gate in the Fifth Settlement occupies a distinguished position and is considered one of the most prominent residential projects in New Cairo, given its strategic location in a vibrant area. The compound enjoys proximity to public services and educational institutions, which gives it a high investment value.

The American University in Cairo: The compound is located a short distance away, approximately 8 minutes away.

90th Street: 90th Street is a prominent landmark and can be reached from the compound in just 5 minutes.

Point 90: This shopping center is located just 4 minutes away from the compound, providing easy access to shopping and entertainment.

Downtown Katameya Mall: The commute from the compound to Downtown Katameya Mall takes approximately 21 minutes.

The location of Al Marasem Fifth Square New Cairo was chosen with great care, as it is located in the Golden Square area in the Fifth Settlement. This location is considered one of the best locations in New Cairo, as it combines several features that make it a distinctive choice for living and investment.
The Golden Square area is famous for providing the best services and facilities. The area includes many prestigious universities such as Future University and American University, making it suitable for students and parents. In addition, there are modern hospitals and high-quality schools in the area, providing an integrated living environment.
What increases the value of the site is its proximity to Cairo International Airport, which facilitates transportation and travel. In addition, there are many commercial malls, entertainment centers, restaurants and cafes in the area, providing residents with many options to spend their time happily.

Azad Compound is a quiet haven in the heart of the big city, located at the heart of New Cairo, the AZAD community is one of the most central and accessible hubs of the city, A fifteen-minute drive from Cairo International Airport. Across the street from The American University in Cairo and Point 90 right next door, next to the Sodic East Compound, and near the 90th Street, which is the most important and vital street in the Fifth Settlement, and a few minutes away from Al Rehab City, Nasr City, and Cairo Festival City Mall.

Services of Azad New Cairo Compound

Azad New Cairo has comprehensive and integrated services that can spare its residents from going anywhere outside it, on top of those services:
-Ample green spaces, parks, trails for walking and sports, and designated places for bicycles
-Swimming pools of different shapes and sizes between residential units

samples.title: Hotel Furnished Apt for Rent Zed 20
samples.description:
Hotel furnished apartment for rent in Zed Towers 20, first use, located on the 6th floor with a stunning direct park view that offers peace, greenery, and natural light throughout the day.

The apartment consists of three spacious bedrooms and three modern bathrooms, designed with a contemporary layout that suits families or luxury stays. The unit is fully furnished with elegant hotel-style furniture and equipped with all essential electrical appliances.

The living area is bright and comfortable, featuring a beautiful open park view and a balcony perfect for relaxing and enjoying the scenery. The kitchen is fully equipped, and each bedroom offers privacy and practical storage space.

Being first use, the apartment is in excellent condition and ready for immediate move-in. It provides a premium living experience inside Zed Towers, known for its high security, organized environment, and proximity to restaurants, cafes, and shopping areas.

This property is ideal for those seeking a high-end furnished rental with a prime location and breathtaking park view.

The Crown – Palm Hills
A Royal Lifestyle in the Heart of 6th of October
The Crown Palm Hills is one of the most prestigious residential developments in 6th of October City, developed by Palm Hills Developments, offering an integrated concept of upscale living in West Cairo within a luxurious compound featuring world-class services and amenities.
The project spans 190 acres, with over 50% dedicated to lush green spaces, complemented by an elegant architectural design that reflects sophistication and comfort.
Key Project Features:
A fully integrated commercial zone featuring international restaurants, cafés, supermarkets, and daily services
A vibrant downtown area combining shopping, business, and entertainment
A fully equipped sports club with diverse recreational facilities
Unique Educational & Wellness Facilities:
A prestigious international school offering world-class education from ages 1 to 18

Close to the 26th of July Corridor

samples.description:
[Properties Today - 2026]

Fully Furnished Luxury Villa for Rent in Palm Hills Golf Extension
: Indulge in premium living at "Palm Hills Golf Extension," featuring a fully furnished standalone villa with modern interiors and smart home integration.

 Elevate your lifestyle in 2026 with this turnkey hotel-standard residence! Properties Today presents an exquisite standalone villa, fully furnished with high-end modern furniture and equipped with advanced "Home Automation" systems for ultimate convenience. This villa is meticulously prepared for immediate move-in, including a fully fitted kitchen, central ACs, and premium appliances. The layout is masterfully designed with 5 spacious bedrooms, including dual master suites, alongside dedicated staff quarters. Located in the elite Golf Extension phase near the Palm Hills Golf Club, this home offers a serene, secure environment with breathtaking landscape views. It is the premier choice for expats, diplomats, and high-net-worth families seeking a sophisticated address in West Cairo’s most coveted community.

Unit Details:

Area: BUA 350 sqm | Land Area 420 sqm.

Layout Highlights:

Ground Floor: Grand Reception | Fully Equipped Kitchen | Guest Toilet | Nanny's Room + Bath | Driver's Room + Bath.

New Giza – An Upscale Lifestyle on the Giza Plateau
New Giza is not just a residential compound; it is a fully integrated community that redefines upscale living in West Cairo. Spanning 1,500 acres, the project offers an exceptional living experience that blends nature, luxury, and world-class services.
The master plan was designed by a renowned international firm, with 87% of the total area dedicated to green spaces and open landscapes, creating a healthy and tranquil environment. The project is thoughtfully divided into integrated residential, educational, medical, recreational, and sports zones.
Residential Districts:
Carnell Park – District One – The Grove – Westridge – Jasperhill – Ivoryhill – Amberville – Kingsrange – Goldcliff – Sky Lakes – The Forty4
The compound offers a wide variety of units, including apartments, duplexes, penthouses, townhouses, twin villas, and standalone villas.
Key Facilities:
New Giza Downtown: A mixed-use destination featuring restaurants, cafés, retail outlets, offices, art galleries, and cinemas
An 18-hole world-class golf course with direct views of the Giza Pyramids and a 4 km walking track
A fully integrated sports club spanning 97,100 sqm
The largest private medical complex in Egypt
Prestigious international universities and schools
Services:
24/7 security – hospitality services – laundry and maintenance services

*About Us*
Your Trusted Real Estate Partner in Maadi
At the heart of Maadi’s vibrant and green community, our real estate company is your go-to partner for tailored, end-to-end property solutions. We specialize in residential rentals, property resale, and comprehensive after-sales services — offering a seamless experience whether you’re relocating, investing, or searching for your perfect home.
What sets us apart is our deep understanding of Maadi’s unique blend of lush surroundings, elegant architecture, and modern infrastructure. From stylish, fully furnished apartments to spacious family villas, our curated property portfolio is designed to meet a wide range of lifestyles and budgets.
But we don’t stop at the transaction. Our dedicated after-sales support includes:
Maintenance coordination
Tenant management
Local market advice
Property supervision for owners abroad
Including full oversight, regular reporting, and assistance with utilities, upkeep, and tenant communication.
We also offer mobility-conscious property solutions, ensuring accessibility for individuals with disabilities or those using wheelchairs.
Full property maintenance — covering electrical work, plumbing, AC servicing, and more through trusted local technicians.
Relocation assistance — helping clients transition smoothly from one property to another, including packing, moving coordination, and settling in.
Whether you’re new to Maadi or a long-time resident looking for a change, we are committed to providing transparent, high-quality service rooted in local expertise and long-term relationships.
Let us help you turn your next move into a rewarding experience

Sunny Villa for Rent in Maadi Sarayat, Cairo, Egypt

The villa includes a fully equipped kitchen with all appliances and benefits from excellent natural light in every room. Outside, there is a large private garden with green views, potted plants, and an open relaxing space, perfect for outdoor living.

Uptown Cairo is ideally situated 200m atop Cairo beyond pollution and congestion, spoiling each home with spectacular city views. Representing the size of Zamalek, the upscale development is built on 1,500 acres that blend in the natural mountainous settings with landscaped foliage and outstanding architecture.



About Emaar:

Transforming lifestyles since 1997. Step into a realm of lavish living and vibrant sophistication with Emaar’s prestigious and exquisite communities. Upholding its reputation as one of the world’s largest and most progressive property developers, Emaar Misr celebrates more than15 years of accomplishments with its distinguished gated communities across the most premium and most beautiful destinations in Egypt: Uptown Cairo in the heart of Cairo, Mivida in New Cairo, Marassi in the North Coast and Cairo Gate in West of Cairo. Developing communities that redefine living standards with world class quality, putting your needs and aspirations first. It is not just about developing thriving neighborhoods that reflect the Good Life that you deserve, but also, creating healthy and lively communities that blend elegance and flair for perfection. WELCOME TO THE WOR

samples.title: فيلا اول صف بحيره صخريه برايفت بول لوكيشن مميز
samples.description:
للايجار بمارينا 5 | فيلا "أول صف بحيرة صخرية" - خصوصية مطلقة وحمام سباحه خاص

لمحبي الفخامة والخصوصية، نقدم لكم واحدة من أحسن الفرص المتاحة في مارينا 5. فيلا مستقلة بموقع استثنائي "أول صف" على البحيرة الصخرية مباشرة، حيث تجتمع الإطلالة البانورامية الخلابة مع التصميم العصري.

5 غرف نوم واسعة مصممة بذكاء لتوفير الراحة القصوى + 4 حمامات بتشطيبات فندقية فاخرة.

تشطيب "سوبر لوكس"، الفيلا مكيفه بالكامل  ، ومطبخ  متكامل بجميع الأجهزة.

تمتاز الفيلا بخصوصية كاملة (Zero Neighbors Overlooking)، مما يجعلها الخيار الأمثل للعائلات الكبيرة.


جاهزة الآن لاستقبال الباحثين عن التميز.

 للحجز والاستفسار: 01029028888

............................................................................


Elkiey Group – ثقة تبني المستقبل

في عالم يتغير بسرعة، تظل Elkiey Group علامة فارقة في مجال الاستثمار والتطوير العقاري، حيث ندمج بين الرؤية العصرية والخبرة العميقة لتقديم مشاريع مميزة تلبي تطلعات عملائنا في الساحل الشمالي ومناطق النخبة في مصر.

نحن لا نقدم عقارات فقط، بل نخلق أسلوب حياة متكامل يجمع بين الفخامة، الراحة، والموقع المثالي. من مارينا إلى مراسي وهاسيندا، نُقدم تجارب سكنية وسياحية راقية، بإدارة احترافية وخدمة عملاء على أعلى مستوى من الاهتمام.

متخصصون في تأجير الوحدات الفاخرة قصيرة وطويلة الأجل، مع خبرة واسعة في تلبية احتياجات كبار الشخصيات (VIP) من حيث الخصوصية، الفخامة، والخدمة الراقية.

Sheikh Zayed City is a thriving city with integrated amenities and service centres serving residents both inside and outside of the Sheikh Zayed compound boundaries. It was important to the city's architectural division to locate the service centres so that they are easily accessible from all directions within Sheikh Zayed City.

Sheikh Zayed City is home to several international and national educational institutions, such as the Nile University, the American International School, the Beverly Hills Language School for all levels, and the Egypt University, in addition to the Canadian International College.

Sheikh Zayed has mosques and churches where people can freely practise their religious beliefs. The Jameh Mosque is the city's most renowned mosque, while the Church of the Virgin is the city's most famous church.

Medical services are readily available in and around Sheikh Zayed City, including the Sheikh Zayed Specialized Hospital, as well as a variety of big pharmacy chains, labs, and private clinics.

Several retail malls and shopping centres serve the requirements of inhabitants of Sheikh Zayed City, such as Al Jazeera Plaza Mall and Americana Plaza Mall, as well as recreational facilities for children like Crazy Water amusement park and parks and public parks, restaurants and cafés

samples.title: توين هاوس بكمبوند جرينز بالتكيفات والمطبخ
samples.description:
توين هاوس بكمبوند جرينز بالتكيفات والمطبخ 
دورين ورووف 
٤ غرف نوم و٤ حمام 
مدينة الشيخ زايد تعتبر واحدة من المدن الجديدة التي تمتاز بكونها تتمتع بقدر كبير من المميزات والخدمات المختلفة مما يتيح لسكانها عيش حياة أفضل من ذي قبل، ويشعرون بالعيش فيها بالراحة والسعادة التي يبحث عنها الناس، بالإضافة إلى أنها تقع في مكان رائع قريب من مدين هامة وهذا يضيف إليها شيء مميز بالفعل.

مدينة الرقي كما يطلق على الشيخ زايد والتي بالفعل تم العمل على أن تكون مكان مميز وفيه العديد من التفاصيل المميزة مما يضفي مزيد من الجمال وأيضا جعل هناك إقبال عليها كبير في الفترة الأخيرة، علاوة على أنها مقسمة بطريقة جيدة وذات شوارع واسعة وبها أحياء راقية كثيرة. 

يوجد في الشيخ زايد 16 حي سكني وتتسم جميعا بتكامل المرافق مما يتيح لك فرصة أن تعيش وسط مكان رائع يخدمك بأفضل شكل ويوفر لك الطمأنينة على مستقبل أطفالك، عندما يقرر المرء البحث عن مكان مختلف للإقامة في مع الاسرة والتمتع بمميزات وخدمات وفيرة تجعل تواجدك فيه أفضل وأكثر راحة، إذا فإن مدينة الشيخ زايد هي بالتأكيد هذا المكان. 

وبالحديث عن المدينة يجب أن لا نغفل عن الأحياء السكنية المتنوعة الموجودة في المدينة والتي تدعم بشكل كبير أكثر من طبقة إجتماعية وتسمح لهم بالسكن فيها وبالتالي هذا يوفر العديد من فرص السكن المعرفة للعملاء بداية من السكن الاقتصادي مرورا بفوق المتوسط حتى نصل إلى المناطق الراقية وأحياء الفيلات والتي تتيح لك أن تتملك وحدة متكاملة الأركان والخدمات بشكل سهل

If you're looking for a small space suitable for your new company, we have a 79-square-meter office for sale in Smart Village.
If you're looking for an investment opportunity, we have a variety of spaces available.

About our company and projects in Smart Village

Naeem Development is a real estate development company specializing in premium administrative and commercial projects (Class A). It is a subsidiary of Naeem Holding Group and focuses its operations within Greater Cairo.
The company aims to deliver smart, integrated work environments through modern designs, strategic locations, and high-quality services.
One of its key past projects is V5 Business Complex—a high-end administrative complex in Smart Village, Zayed—offering office spaces ranging from 64 sqm to 5,000 sqm, surrounded by green areas and designed to enhance productivity.
The project is equipped with modern amenities and features an architectural design that prioritizes both psychological and visual comfort within the workplace.
The company's latest development is LINX Business Park, also located in Smart Village. It includes administrative and commercial units starting from 74 sqm.
LINX stands out with its sustainable design and direct location on the Ring Road and 26th of July Corridor. The project includes four underground parking levels.
Naeem Development has also delivered other successful projects such as Northside Business Park and ARC Business Park, attracting leading international and local companies.
The company strongly believes that a high quality of life in the workplace enhances business efficiency and is committed to developing spaces that inspire and support professional growth.

samples.description:
If you're looking for a small space suitable for your new company, we have a 79-square-meter office for sale in Smart Village.
If you're looking for an investment opportunity, we have a variety of spaces available.

About our company and projects in Smart Village

Naeem Development is a real estate development company specializing in premium administrative and commercial projects (Class A). It is a subsidiary of Naeem Holding Group and focuses its operations within Greater Cairo.
The company aims to deliver smart, integrated work environments through modern designs, strategic locations, and high-quality services.
One of its key past projects is V5 Business Complex—a high-end administrative complex in Smart Village, Zayed—offering office spaces ranging from 64 sqm to 5,000 sqm, surrounded by green areas and designed to enhance productivity.
The project is equipped with modern amenities and features an architectural design that prioritizes both psychological and visual comfort within the workplace.
The company's latest development is LINX Business Park, also located in Smart Village. It includes administrative and commercial units starting from 74 sqm.
LINX stands out with its sustainable design and direct location on the Ring Road and 26th of July Corridor. The project includes four underground parking levels.
Naeem Development has also delivered other successful projects such as Northside Business Park and ARC Business Park, attracting leading international and local companies.
The company strongly believes that a high quality of life in the workplace enhances business efficiency and is committed to developing spaces that inspire and support professional growth.

samples.title: 210 SQM Office | 10% Down, Delivery Next Year
samples.description:
210 SQM Administrative Office for Sale – V5

A 210 sqm corner administrative office is now available for sale within the V5 Project in Smart Village, offering a pleasant view of landscaped green areas. The office is located on Banks Street, providing easy access to all financial and administrative services. Its flexible layout allows for independent office spaces or an open-plan configuration to suit the company’s operational needs.

Location and Strategic Importance

Smart Village is one of Egypt’s leading business hubs, located in 6th of October City, directly opposite Sheikh Zayed. It enjoys quick access to the Ring Road and 26 July Corridor, making it easy to connect with Greater Cairo and surrounding business areas.
The strategic location ensures proximity to all banks and financial services, simplifying daily transactions for employees and clients. In addition, Smart Village hosts a fully integrated business community with major telecommunications, technology, and financial service companies, supported by advanced digital infrastructure and reliable power and communications systems.

Environment and Services

The office overlooks spacious green areas, creating a calm and productive working environment.
Essential administrative services, including the Egyptian Postal Office, are available within the village. With Banks Street adjacent to the building, all financial operations can be handled quickly and efficiently, reducing travel time for employees and clients.
Smart Village also provides a 24/7 operational framework with all necessary services at hand, allowing businesses to function smoothly and efficiently.

Office Status and Delivery

The office is available for inspection now, and delivery is scheduled for next year, providing clarity and flexibility for planning operational setup and internal arrangements. The upcoming delivery allows businesses to start operations without unnecessary delays compared to other projects still under long-term construction.

samples.title: امتلك مكتبك الاداري في شارع البشبيشي دمياط الجديدة
samples.description:
امتلك مكتبك الآن في واحد من أقوى مواقع الاستثمار الإداري

في قلب منطقة حيوية ومتميزة ، بريق بموقع استراتيجي عند امتداد البشبيشي × ناصية شارع 17، ليمنحك عنوانًا احترافيًا يعكس قوة نشاطك ويعزز من قيمة استثمارك. مشروع إداري بتصميم عصري وواجهات مودرن أنيقة تمنح وحدتك طابعًا مميزًا يليق بأعمالك.

المشروع تحت إشراف الاستشاري الهندسي م. محمد طلعت، مع إدارة وتشغيل وصيانة وأمن من شركة Russell السعودية، ما يضمن لك تشغيل احترافي ومستوى خدمات عالي يحافظ على قيمة استثمارك على المدى الطويل.

تفاصيل الوحدة: مكتب إداري بالدور الثاني – واجهة مباشرة على شارع البشبيشي
أمام السلم مباشرة لسهولة الوصول والحركة
المساحة: 52 متر مربع
السعر الإجمالي: 3,146,000 جنيه

الوحدة كاملة التشطيب + تكييفات مركزية، مما يوفر عليك تكاليف وتجهيزات إضافية، لتبدأ نشاطك فور الاستلام في بيئة عمل متكاملة. الموقع القوي يضمن كثافة حركة عالية وفرصة استثمارية مضمونة سواء للاستخدام الإداري أو لإعادة البيع بعائد مميز.

إذا كنت تبحث عن مقر إداري يعكس احترافية شركتك أو فرصة استثمارية بعائد مستقر في منطقة واعدة، فهذه الوحدة هي اختيارك الذكي.

samples.title: مكتب للبيع دمياط الجديدة المركزية | 60 متر بجوار ا
samples.description:
مكتب للبيع دمياط الجديدة المركزية | 60 متر بجوار الخدمات ​
مكتب تجاري للبيع بدمياط الجديدة المركزية | دور أول علوي بجوار البنوك والخدمات​

هل تبحث عن مكتب تجاري بموقع استراتيجي؟ مكتب حديث 60 متر بتشطيب عصري وفخم، في قلب دمياط الجديدة المركزية بجوار البنوك، مركز الشرطة، البرندات، والمولات - موقع ذهبي لأي نشاط تجاري أو عيادة طبية أو مكتب شركة.​

مميزات العرض:

مساحة 60 متر مربع (دور أول علوي - موقع حيوي)

مكتب مفتوح أو مقسم حسب الحاجة

موقع ذهبي بالمركزية (حركة عملاء كبيرة)

بجوار البنوك والمحاكم والخدمات الحكومية

بجوار المولات والبرندات التجارية

إنشاءات بدأت بالفعل - استلام قريب

تشطيب عصري احترافي

مناسب لـ: مكتب استشارات | عيادة طبية | مكتب شركة | خدمات | محاسبة | تأمين ​

خطة السداد المرنة:

السعر الإجمالي: 3,120,000 جنيه

المقدم: 936,000 جنيه (30%)

قسط سهل على سنتين

أقساط شهرية منخفضة

لماذا تختار الآن؟ موقع المركزية الحيوي يضمن استثمار تجاري آمن بعائد إيجار  (مكتب أو عيادة أو شركة)، حركة عملاء طبيعية قوية، مناسب لأي نشاط تجاري احترافي، أسعار تنافسية قبل ارتفاع الأسعار في 2025.​

 احجز الآن + جولة مجانية

samples.title: مكتب اداري للبيع بدمياط الجديدة بجوار جامعة حورس
samples.description:
فرصتك تمتلك مكتب إداري في مول متكامل بموقع مميز وواجهة 280 متر على شارع رئيسي، ضمن مشروع مقام على مساحة 8400 متر، وبلازا خارجية بمساحة 5000 متر بتخدم كل الأنشطة داخل المول.

الوحدات الإدارية ليها مدخل خاص بمساحة 5 متر، منفصل عن التجاري والطبي، لضمان الخصوصية والاحترافية.

المول مجهز بـ 6 مصاعد رئيسية، 3 مصاعد خدمة، و8 سلالم داخلية لتسهيل تنقل الموظفين والزوار، مع شوارع محيطة عريضة (توصل لـ 20 متر) وارتفاعات داخلية مرنة بتوصل لـ 5.5 متر.

المكاتب الإدارية متوفرة في أدوار مخصصة تجمع بين الاستخدام الإداري والطبي والتجاري، ما يضمن حركة دائمة وفرص تعاون واستفادة بين الأنشطة.

Location 
Heliopolis – Omar Ibn El Khattab Street 
One of the most important and well-known main streets, characterized by high commercial and administrative density and a prime strategic location. 
Property Description 
A distinguished commercial and administrative headquarters, ideal for major companies, banks, showrooms, and corporate offices. The property features super lux finishing and is ready for immediate use.

Super lux finishing

Price 
Asking Price: EGP 65,000,000 
Negotiable 
Company Commission: 1.5% 

About Heliopolis: 
 
Heliopolis, known as Masr El Gedida in Arabic, is one of Cairo's most iconic and affluent neighborhoods. Established in the early 20th century by Belgian industrialist Baron Empain, it was designed to be a modern suburban district with a blend of European architectural styles and Egyptian charm. Heliopolis is renowned for its wide, tree-lined streets, elegant villas, and historical landmarks such as the Baron Empain Palace and St. Mark's Basilica. The area boasts a vibrant community, abundant greenery, and a mix of residential, commercial, and recreational spaces. Its prime location provides easy access to Cairo International Airport and major districts like Nasr City and Downtown Cairo. Heliopolis is a sought-after destination for families and professionals seeking a balance of modern convenience and rich heritage.

Nasr City is one of the largest and most important residential and commercial districts in Cairo, strategically located east of the capital and near key roads such as the Ring Road and Salah Salem Street. Established in the 1960s, the area has undergone significant urban development, making it a prime destination for living and investment. It is home to major shopping centers like City Stars and City Centre, as well as a wide range of restaurants, cafés, hospitals, international schools, and universities. Nasr City is divided into several neighborhoods, including the First, Eighth, and Ninth Zones, catering to different social classes. The district boasts a well-developed infrastructure and an extensive transportation network connecting it to other parts of Cairo, making it one of the city's most vibrant and sought-after areas. 
 
About Property Network 
 
Property Network is a real estate services company specializing in residential, administrative and commercial real estate, investment opportunities, real estate appraisals, mortgage and all other real estate related activities.

About Nasr City

Nasr City is one of the largest and most vibrant districts in Cairo, Egypt. Established in the 1960s, it is known for its strategic location, modern infrastructure, and thriving commercial and residential areas. The district is divided into multiple zones, offering a mix of residential neighborhoods, office spaces, and shopping hubs. Nasr City is home to several landmarks, including Cairo International Stadium, City Stars Mall, and Al-Azhar University.

It provides a wide range of amenities such as schools, hospitals, parks, and recreational facilities, making it a popular choice for families and professionals. Its wide streets, accessibility to major highways, and proximity to New Cairo and Downtown Cairo further enhance its appeal as a key hub in the city.

samples.title: امتلك مكتبك الاداري في شارع البشبيشي دمياط الجديدة
samples.description:
امتلك مكتبك الآن في واحد من أقوى مواقع الاستثمار الإداري

في قلب منطقة حيوية ومتميزة ، بريق بموقع استراتيجي عند امتداد البشبيشي × ناصية شارع 17، ليمنحك عنوانًا احترافيًا يعكس قوة نشاطك ويعزز من قيمة استثمارك. مشروع إداري بتصميم عصري وواجهات مودرن أنيقة تمنح وحدتك طابعًا مميزًا يليق بأعمالك.

المشروع تحت إشراف الاستشاري الهندسي م. محمد طلعت، مع إدارة وتشغيل وصيانة وأمن من شركة Russell السعودية، ما يضمن لك تشغيل احترافي ومستوى خدمات عالي يحافظ على قيمة استثمارك على المدى الطويل.

تفاصيل الوحدة: مكتب إداري بالدور الثاني – واجهة مباشرة على شارع البشبيشي
أمام السلم مباشرة لسهولة الوصول والحركة
المساحة: 52 متر مربع
السعر الإجمالي: 3,146,000 جنيه

الوحدة كاملة التشطيب + تكييفات مركزية، مما يوفر عليك تكاليف وتجهيزات إضافية، لتبدأ نشاطك فور الاستلام في بيئة عمل متكاملة. الموقع القوي يضمن كثافة حركة عالية وفرصة استثمارية مضمونة سواء للاستخدام الإداري أو لإعادة البيع بعائد مميز.

إذا كنت تبحث عن مقر إداري يعكس احترافية شركتك أو فرصة استثمارية بعائد مستقر في منطقة واعدة، فهذه الوحدة هي اختيارك الذكي.

samples.title: مكتب للبيع دمياط الجديدة المركزية | 60 متر بجوار ا
samples.description:
مكتب للبيع دمياط الجديدة المركزية | 60 متر بجوار الخدمات ​
مكتب تجاري للبيع بدمياط الجديدة المركزية | دور أول علوي بجوار البنوك والخدمات​

هل تبحث عن مكتب تجاري بموقع استراتيجي؟ مكتب حديث 60 متر بتشطيب عصري وفخم، في قلب دمياط الجديدة المركزية بجوار البنوك، مركز الشرطة، البرندات، والمولات - موقع ذهبي لأي نشاط تجاري أو عيادة طبية أو مكتب شركة.​

مميزات العرض:

مساحة 60 متر مربع (دور أول علوي - موقع حيوي)

مكتب مفتوح أو مقسم حسب الحاجة

موقع ذهبي بالمركزية (حركة عملاء كبيرة)

بجوار البنوك والمحاكم والخدمات الحكومية

بجوار المولات والبرندات التجارية

إنشاءات بدأت بالفعل - استلام قريب

تشطيب عصري احترافي

مناسب لـ: مكتب استشارات | عيادة طبية | مكتب شركة | خدمات | محاسبة | تأمين ​

خطة السداد المرنة:

السعر الإجمالي: 3,120,000 جنيه

المقدم: 936,000 جنيه (30%)

قسط سهل على سنتين

أقساط شهرية منخفضة

لماذا تختار الآن؟ موقع المركزية الحيوي يضمن استثمار تجاري آمن بعائد إيجار  (مكتب أو عيادة أو شركة)، حركة عملاء طبيعية قوية، مناسب لأي نشاط تجاري احترافي، أسعار تنافسية قبل ارتفاع الأسعار في 2025.​

 احجز الآن + جولة مجانية

samples.title: 115sqm Retail | Downtown Alamein | Great View
samples.description:
115 m² Retail at the lowest price in Downtown - New Alamein
--------------------------
Unit type: Retail 
Unit area: 115 M
---------------------------
Total price : 16,873,248
dp : 5,082,108
----------------------
Features of Downtown
-----------------------
Downtown New Alamein Compound on the North Coast offers units for sale at various prices. Downtown New Alamein is one of City Edge Real Estate Development projects and is owned by the New Urban Communities Authority. The Downtown New Alamein project is also distinguished by its brilliant strategic location.

It is located in the center of New Alamein and is a short walk from the beach, about 15 minutes. The compound also provides its residents with all kinds of services, including restaurants serving a variety of dishes, green entertainment spaces for children, and sports clubs. The place is also characterized by luxury, sophistication, and an excellent coastal atmosphere.

City Edge Company was established in 2017, and it is an alliance of three large real estate companies together: the New Urban Communities Authority (60%), the Holding Company for Investment and Real Estate Development (2%), and the Housing and Development Bank (38%).
They were actually able to achieve sweeping success. Their sales reached more than 1,000 residential units in the first 9 months of 2019, amounting to more than 6.5 billion pounds.
Owning a residential unit in Downtown El Alamein Compound is a good investment for you and your family, as it provides you with the opportunity to live in luxury throughout the year. You live next to your children’s schools and universities and at the same time next to the sea, which means that you will not need to travel long distances to change your mood or to meet the family’s daily needs.
------------------------------------------------
For more information call: 01092892866

samples.title: For Sale: Shop in Madinaty – Craft Zone Mall
samples.description:
For Sale: Shop in Madinaty – Craft Zone Mall 

Location: Craft Zone Mall, Madinaty 

Area: 72 sqm 

Floors: 2 

Finishing: Super Lux 

View: On the main street 

Rental Status: Leased until April 2026 

Current Rent: 46,000 EGP/month 

Code: PFAMK028 

Price: 18,000,000 EGP (Negotiable) 

Madinaty is one of the largest and most prestigious integrated residential communities in Egypt, developed by Talaat Moustafa Group in East Cairo. The city is designed with a modern layout that offers a fully integrated environment, featuring a variety of residential units, from apartments to villas, surrounded by vast green spaces and artificial lakes that provide a sense of comfort and luxury. Madinaty includes essential and recreational services such as international schools, shopping centers, hospitals, restaurants, and sports facilities, making it an ideal destination for a high-end contemporary lifestyle. The city also boasts advanced infrastructure and comprehensive security services, ensuring a high level of privacy and safety for its residents.

Madinaty is one of the largest and most prestigious integrated residential communities in Egypt, developed by Talaat Moustafa Group in East Cairo. The city is designed with a modern layout that offers a fully integrated environment, featuring a variety of residential units, from apartments to villas, surrounded by vast green spaces and artificial lakes that provide a sense of comfort and luxury. Madinaty includes essential and recreational services such as international schools, shopping centers, hospitals, restaurants, and sports facilities, making it an ideal destination for a high-end contemporary lifestyle. The city also boasts advanced infrastructure and comprehensive security services, ensuring a high level of privacy and safety for its residents.
