115 m² Retail at the lowest price in Downtown - New Alamein
--------------------------
Unit type: Retail 
Unit area: 115 M
---------------------------
Total price : 16,873,248
dp : 5,082,108
----------------------
Features of Downtown
-----------------------
Downtown New Alamein Compound on the North Coast offers units for sale at various prices. Downtown New Alamein is one of City Edge Real Estate Development projects and is owned by the New Urban Communities Authority. The Downtown New Alamein project is also distinguished by its brilliant strategic location.

It is located in the center of New Alamein and is a short walk from the beach, about 15 minutes. The compound also provides its residents with all kinds of services, including restaurants serving a variety of dishes, green entertainment spaces for children, and sports clubs. The place is also characterized by luxury, sophistication, and an excellent coastal atmosphere.

City Edge Company was established in 2017, and it is an alliance of three large real estate companies together: the New Urban Communities Authority (60%), the Holding Company for Investment and Real Estate Development (2%), and the Housing and Development Bank (38%).
They were actually able to achieve sweeping success. Their sales reached more than 1,000 residential units in the first 9 months of 2019, amounting to more than 6.5 billion pounds.
Owning a residential unit in Downtown El Alamein Compound is a good investment for you and your family, as it provides you with the opportunity to live in luxury throughout the year. You live next to your children’s schools and universities and at the same time next to the sea, which means that you will not need to travel long distances to change your mood or to meet the family’s daily needs.
------------------------------------------------
For more information call: 01092892866

samples.title: Own a Retail Shop in the Heart of Sheikh ZAYED
samples.description:
Retail Shop for Sale in 101 Mall Sheikh Zayed – Prime Location in the Heart of Zayed

A great investment opportunity to own a 58 sqm retail shop inside 101 Mall Sheikh Zayed, one of the newest commercial projects in the heart of Sheikh Zayed City. The mall enjoys a strategic location on Saudi Street, directly next to Downtown Zayed and close to the Islamic Complex and Spectra Square, making it one of the most vibrant areas with high daily foot traffic.

The project is developed by Premium S Developments, part of Nassir Group, a well-established business group operating in the Egyptian market since 2007. The group has diverse investments across several sectors including wheat silos and flour mills in Sadat City, logistics and shipping services, import and export, general contracting, as well as the well-known seafood restaurant chain Asmak Bahr. This wide experience reflects the strength and credibility of the developer behind the project.

The mall is built on a 5,000 sqm plot, with only 40% building footprint, allowing for well-organized spaces and smooth movement throughout the project. The development consists of two basement levels, a ground floor, and five upper floors. The basements are dedicated to parking and services, while the ground and first floors are allocated for retail units. The upper floors host administrative and medical units.

Unit Details:

Unit Type: Retail Shop

Area: 58 sqm

Location: Commercial floor inside the mall

Delivery: Within 6 months

This retail unit benefits from its location within a mall serving a dense residential area in Sheikh Zayed, ensuring strong customer traffic and excellent potential for business success. It is ideal for various activities such as restaurants, cafés, fashion stores, or service-based businesses.

Another key advantage of the project is the fast delivery time, as the building is already under construction and nearing completion. This allows investors and business owners to start operating their businesse

Linx Business Park - Smart Village

Located in the heart of Smart Village, Linx Business Park offers a prestigious and strategic location for businesses looking to thrive in Egypt's vibrant business hub.

Project Overview

Linx Business Park is a cutting-edge commercial development designed to meet the evolving needs of modern businesses. With its prime location, state-of-the-art infrastructure, and exceptional amenities, this project is perfect for companies looking to elevate their presence in Egypt.

Key Features

- Core and Shell Units for Sale: Flexible spaces to suit various business needs
- Fully Finished Units for Rent: Ready-to-move-in offices with top-notch finishes
- Average Sale Price: 150K EGP per meter (core and shell)
- Average Rent Price: 1K EGP per meter (fully finished)
- Amenities:
- High-speed internet and connectivity
- 24/7 security and CCTV surveillance
- Ample parking spaces
- Conference and meeting rooms
- Cafes and restaurants
- Green spaces and landscaped areas

Location Advantages

- Situated in Smart Village, a prime business district in 6th of October City
- Easy access to major roads and highways
- Close proximity to international schools, hotels, and residential areas

Unit Types

- Offices: 50-500 sqm
- Meeting rooms and conference spaces available for rent

Why Choose Linx Business Park?

- Prime Location: Establish your presence in a thriving business hub
- Modern Infrastructure: Designed to support your business growth
- Flexible Spaces: Core and shell or fully finished units to suit your needs
- Exceptional Amenities: Elevate your work experience with top-notch facilities

Bigger Asset is a real estate consultancy based in Egypt, aiming at providing comprehensive services for your commercial real estate

About Maadi :
Maadi is one of the most famous areas of the Egyptian capital, Cairo, located in the south of the city on the eastern bank of the Nile River
Maadi and its streets are immersed in a surprising silence, as it is not far from the center of the capital more than ten kilometers to the south, but it still retains its splendor and privacy within the framework of those voices that called almost a hundred years ago to create a distinctive and special residential neighborhood for the Egyptian aristocracy.
Which included the pashas, the ruling elite, some intellectuals, in addition to the English community.

samples.description:
Office Space for Rent – Heliopolis

Location: Heliopolis – El Merghany Main Street 
Area: 500 m² 
Floor: 1st Floor 
Finishing: Old Finishing 
License: Administrative Reconciliation 
Bedrooms: 7 
Bathrooms: 3 
Rental Price: EGP 150,000 / Month 

About Heliopolis: 
 
Heliopolis, known as Masr El Gedida in Arabic, is one of Cairo's most iconic and affluent neighborhoods. Established in the early 20th century by Belgian industrialist Baron Empain, it was designed to be a modern suburban district with a blend of European architectural styles and Egyptian charm. Heliopolis is renowned for its wide, tree-lined streets, elegant villas, and historical landmarks such as the Baron Empain Palace and St. Mark's Basilica. The area boasts a vibrant community, abundant greenery, and a mix of residential, commercial, and recreational spaces. Its prime location provides easy access to Cairo International Airport and major districts like Nasr City and Downtown Cairo. Heliopolis is a sought-after destination for families and professionals seeking a balance of modern convenience and rich heritage. 
 
About Property Network

Al Karma 4 Mall is a mixed-use commercial project in a prime location in the heart of Sheikh Zayed City. It offers essential and recreational services to attract investors and business professionals.

The project is located in a high-traffic area behind Al Ahly Club, adjacent to the prestigious Al Karma residential compound and Al Rabwa compound.

samples.title: commercial retail prime location in smart village
samples.description:
Retail Unit for Rent – LINX Building | Smart Village

A prime opportunity to rent a 63 sqm retail unit – shell & core – ready for immediate delivery in LINX Building, located in Smart Village. LINX is the only building within Smart Village that features commercial units, giving it a strong competitive advantage and ensuring that all foot traffic is concentrated in one prime location.

The building is directly facing Arab Academy for Science, Technology & Maritime Transport, which serves more than 120,000 students. This creates a massive, continuously renewing customer base on a daily basis. The strategic location positions the unit to effectively serve students, faculty members, and professionals working within Smart Village — ensuring strong and sustainable returns.

Area & Pricing Details:

Unit Size: 63 sqm

Rental Price per sqm: EGP 850

 Total Monthly Rent:
63 × 850 = EGP 53,550 per month

The unit is delivered shell & core, allowing full flexibility to design and fit out the space according to your business needs — whether a café, quick-service restaurant, student services hub, clinic, or retail concept targeting the high-density student traffic directly in front of the building.

Immediate delivery – A strong opportunity to launch your business in a guaranteed high-footfall location within the most strategic commercial spot in Smart Village.

Our team consists of passionate and highly experienced professionals with a collective expertise of over 8 years in the commercial market.

At Commercial State, we are committed to helping you achieve your commercial real estate goals. Our extensive range of services is designed to provide you with the support and guidance you need every step of the way. Whether you are looking to buy, sell, or lease a commercial property, our dedicated team is here to assist you.

samples.title: محل تجارى فى المعادى شارع اللاسلكى 275 متر
samples.description:
محل تجارى للايجار


العنوان:شارع اللاسلكى المعادى الجديده


مساحه 275 متر مربع


سعر متر الايجار 400 جنيه


اجمالى سعر الايجار110,000
 


عن نيو أفنيو:

نيو أفنيو للاستثمار و التسويق العقاري هي احدى الشركات الرائدة في مجال التسويق و الاستثمار العقاري في مصر.
نهدف إلى توفير خدمات شاملة لتلبية احتياجاتكم العقارية من بيع, شراء, او استئجار الوحدات العقارية سواء سكنية أو تجارية.                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                   
نظرا لتجاربنا الفردية في شركات العقارات في مصر و الخارج، قد توصلنا إلى استنتاج أن الثقة هي العامل الأساسي الذي ينبغي علينا تقديمه لك عندما يتعلق الأمر بشراء أو استئجار أو عرض الممتلكات الخاصة بك للبيع أو الإيجار.
                                                                                                                                                              
كما نقدم لعملائنا افضل الاستشارات للاستثمار العقاري

Details about Al Maqsad Compound
-----------------
The area of the Al Maqsad City Edge project is about 214 acres divided into two residential areas, one of which is 97 acres and the other is 117 acres. It includes units with areas starting from 111 square meters and up to 187 square meters.
Al Maqsad Administrative Capital Compound is located in the R3 area, plots D4-D5, next to the most important and famous landmarks of the New Capital, such as the financial and business district, the Olympic Village, the Presidential Palace, and the government district.
Developer of Al Maqsad Residence Compound, New Administrative Capital
The real estate developer of the Al Maqsad Residence project is City Edge Real Estate Development Company, which is an alliance between the New Urban Communities Authority and the Housing and Development Bank, and it is a leading company in the real estate market and is famous for its precise implementation of projects and its commitment to the deadlines for receiving projects.
The company places among its most important goals the development of new urban communities with the highest standards of quality and the provision of luxury units to customers

samples.title: Retail Space for Rent in 205 Strip
samples.description:
Retail Space for Rent in 205 Strip – Prime Commercial Location

A rare opportunity to lease a spacious retail unit in one of the most vibrant commercial destinations in 205 Strip, strategically located near Sheikh Zayed City and 6th of October City. The project is known for its high foot traffic, premium brands, and dynamic retail environment.

This unit is ideal for restaurants, cafés, showrooms, retail stores, or service-based businesses looking to establish a strong presence in a prime commercial hub.

Property Details

• Location: 205 Strip
• Unit Type: Retail Shop
• Built-Up Area: 220 sqm
• Layout: Open space
• Finishing: Core & Shell (ready for customized fit-out)
• Usage: Suitable for retail, F&B concepts, showrooms, and premium brands

Key Features

• Prime commercial location within a high-demand retail destination
• Open layout allowing full flexibility in interior design and branding
• Large frontage potential providing excellent visibility and signage opportunities
• High footfall area attracting visitors from surrounding residential communities
• Ideal for flagship retail concepts or upscale dining experiences

Location Advantages

• Located in 205 Strip, one of West Cairo’s emerging retail hubs
• Minutes from Sheikh Zayed City
• Close to 6th of October City
• Easy access to 26th of July Corridor
• Surrounded by high-end residential compounds and office developments

Asking Price

•Rent: 500,000 EGP

This retail unit represents an excellent opportunity for brands and investors seeking a prime location with strong commercial potential in West Cairo.
